# ANALYSIS: RIBBON_SIGNAL_GATE_VALIDATION_AND_SWEEP

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The RIBBON_SIGNAL_GATE (rmom>=5 + rdur<=20 + midday_tl gate) captures institutional order flow imbalances during EMA ribbon separation phases. The gate exists because widening ribbon momentum (rmom) indicates accelerating bearish/bullish conviction, short ribbon duration (rdur) avoids stale trends, and the midday trendline filter prevents chop-induced false signals. We validate if this gate preserves J's winner days while suppressing loser days across the full dataset.

## Mechanism

**Entry trigger:**  
- `ribbon_momentum >= 5` (3-bar EMA spread widening rate)  
- `ribbon_duration <= 20` (consecutive bars in ribbon stack direction)  
- `midday_tl_gate = True` (no single-trigger trendline_rejection entries between 11:30-14:00 ET)  

**Exit logic:**  
- Follows BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON setup rules:  
  - TP1 at +30% premium (sell 2/3)  
  - Runner stop moves to breakeven after TP1  
  - Runner exits on ribbon re-entry, rejection signature, or 15:50 ET time stop  
  - Premium stop at -8% (from params.json)

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account ~= 14% headline P&L (per OP-20 disclosure 1 and LESSONS-LEARNED L11)
2. **Sample bias:** Validation used 60-day OOS spot check (n=23 signals); selection method was walk-forward held-out window; overfit risk mitigated by requiring n>=50 signals in threshold sweep
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (full-OOS sweep across all cached-fill days not yet executed)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J days real-fills check not yet performed)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: False signal during low-volume chop (e.g., 2025-Q3/Q4) causing -$200/trade loss
   - Max drawdown: -$1,200 (estimated from regime concentration in Q2-2026)
   - Blow-up scenario: Persistent sideways market with ribbon whipsaws (rmom oscillating near threshold) causing sequential -5% premium losses
6. **Concentration:** Top-5 days = 68% of P&L (estimated from 60-day OOS validation; requires full-OOS confirmation)

## Pre-merge gate

- Gym validators: 67/67 PASS (no changes to core engine logic)
- Walk-forward: OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >= 0.50 on full cached-fill dataset
- Real-fills: Top 3 J days P&L diff < ±20% vs BS sim
- J Rule 9 ratification: Anchor gate check must show non-negative delta on all J days

## Confidence

6 / 10 -- Based on 60-day OOS validation showing +11.8/c/trade, but lacking per-J-day breakdown and full-OOS confirmation. Threshold sweep pending.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE (rank 21) by filtering early-morning ribbon noise; conflicts with BEARISH_SWEEP_BLOCKER (rank 1) only if sweep_blocker logic interferes with ribbon_duration calculation (requires joint gym validation). No direct overlap with existing watcher-only candidates (ranks 3-5, 8-11, 13-16, 18-20).
